---
title: "J. ANDRADE-SÁNCHEZ"
subtitle: "Research, photography, and data viz"
---

## About

::::: grid
::: g-col-6
My name is Jorge Andrade Sánchez, a wildlife ecologist from Baja California. My father's family (Andrade-Murillo) is one of the oldest families from Baja California Sur, particularly from La Paz and Santa Rosalía (Choyero lands). My mother's side, the Sánchez-Servín family, migrated from Nahuatzen, Michoacán to San Vicentito, and later to El Rosario in 1945. I grew up in Ensenada, traveling across the peninsula visiting my family. The landscapes, wildlife, and people of Baja California have shaped who I am and the work I do today. In this website, I'll share my research, photography, and personal perspectives.
:::

::: g-col-6
![](Images/Yo.png)
:::
:::::
::: {.text-center}

[![](logos/gmail_s.svg){width="40"}](mailto:jorge.andrade@uabc.edu.mx)&nbsp;&nbsp;
[![](logos/RG.png){width="40"}](https://www.researchgate.net/profile/Jorge-Andrade-11)&nbsp;&nbsp;
[![](logos/orcid.png){width="40"}](https://orcid.org/0000-0003-4683-3617)
:::

Test deploy
